name: Reentrancy Verification Grimoire
description: Expert procedure for verifying reentrancy vulnerabilities. Analyzes external call ordering, checks for guards, generates Foundry tests with malicious callbacks, and interprets results.
author: VKG Team
graph_queries: FIND functions WHERE has_reentrancy_guard = false AND has_external_call = true

steps.name: Generate Exploit Test
steps.description: Generate Foundry test with attacker contract callback

steps.name: Fuzz for Edge Cases
steps.description: Run Medusa/Echidna to find edge case reentrancies

steps.name: Analyze Results
steps.description: Analyze all test and fuzz results

verdict_rules.explanation: Exploit test confirmed reentrancy is exploitable
CEI violation without reentrancy guard - likely vulnerable
State write after external call without guard
No CEI violation and proper call ordering
